SEARCH
Package entities

Class OpeningHours

java.lang.Object
entities.OpeningHours
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class OpeningHours extends Object implements Serializable
Entity class representing the opening hours of the restaurant. This entity handles both recurring weekly schedules (based on Day of Week) and specific special dates (overriding the regular schedule).
See Also:
